common.encryptedBanner: 🔒 Some movements encrypted with your previous PIN cannot be decrypted and have been excluded from calculations.

auth.errorPasswordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and numbers.
auth.errorLoginFailed: We couldn't sign you in. Check that your email and password are correct, or create an account if you don't have one yet.
auth.successRegister: Registration successful. Check your email to confirm your account. If you don't see it, check your spam or junk folder.
auth.successResetLink: We've sent you a link to recover your password. Check your inbox.

pin.subtitleCreate: Choose 6 digits to protect your finances. You can recover access via email if you forget it.
pin.errorPinMismatch: PINs do not match. Please try again.
pin.errorVaultExists: You already have a vault. Enter your original PIN.
pin.errorVaultNoSalt: Vault without salt. Contact support or use recovery.
pin.errorLinkExpired: The recovery link has expired or was already used.
pin.recoveryIntro: If you forgot your PIN, we can send a link to <email>{email}</email> to create a new one.
pin.recoveryWarning: movements encrypted with your current PIN cannot be recovered with the new PIN. Categories and accounts are kept.
pin.recoverySuccessWarning: ⚠️ Using that link you'll be able to create a new PIN, but movements encrypted with the old PIN will no longer be readable. Category and account data is kept.
pin.errorRecoveryGenerate: Error generating the link. Please try again later.
pin.errorRecoveryEmail: Error sending the email. Please try again later.
pin.biometricOfferDesc: Do you want to use your device's biometrics to unlock GastOS instead of the PIN?
pin.biometricSettingsHint: You can enable or disable it later in Settings → Security
pin.biometricErrorActivate: Could not activate. Please try again.

ingreso.needTwoAccountsHint: Create your accounts from the menu → My Accounts
ingreso.recurModalDescGasto: We can mark it as recurring for better tracking.
ingreso.recurModalDescIngreso: We can remind you to confirm when you've been paid.
ingreso.recurringTransferDesc: It will repeat automatically every month

dashboard.widgetSaldoDesc: Net worth broken down by account
dashboard.widgetProyeccionDesc: Estimated expense and savings by end of month
dashboard.widgetMediaDesc: Daily average expense vs previous month
dashboard.widgetPresupuestosDesc: Monthly limits by category this month
dashboard.widgetMapaDesc: Days of the month colored by daily spending
dashboard.widgetAreaDesc: Cumulative net balance month by month
dashboard.widgetObjetivoDesc: Progress towards your monthly goal · configurable in Settings → Goals
dashboard.widgetDiaMasCaroDesc: The day with the highest spending this month
dashboard.widgetGastoDiaDesc: Which days you tend to spend more
dashboard.widgetDistribucionDesc: Of every €100 you earn, how much you spend
dashboard.widgetRachaDesc: Consecutive days without spending in a category
dashboard.customizeHint: Enable or disable the blocks you want to see
dashboard.ahorroRitmoActual: if you maintain your current pace
dashboard.noIncomesForProjection: Add income to see projected savings
dashboard.objetivoRecomendado: Recommended goal: save at least 20% of your income
dashboard.noPresupuestosHint: Go to Settings → Budgets to add limits
dashboard.rachaNoActiveHint: Record a day without spending to start
dashboard.rachaConsecut: consecutive days without spending at end of month
dashboard.ratioModerate: Moderate savings, you can do better
dashboard.ratioNegative: You spend more than you earn
dashboard.acumuladoMesDia: Monthly accumulation by day of week

settings.title: Settings
settings.langChangeWarning: When you change the language the app will reload and you will need to enter your PIN again.
settings.categoriasHint: Categories appear in the <tab>Register</tab> tab to classify your movements.
settings.catCanRecurDesc: When logging an expense in this category, it will ask if it repeats
settings.catErrorDelete: Could not delete. It may have associated movements.
settings.presupuestosHint: Assign a monthly limit to your <gasto>pure expense</gasto> categories. The budgets widget on the <dashboard>Dashboard</dashboard> shows the progress of each limit.
settings.presupuestosNoCats: You don't have any expense categories yet.
settings.objetivosHint: Define monthly savings goals. The <widget>Savings Goal</widget> widget on the Dashboard will show your progress. Data is encrypted with your PIN.
settings.seguridadHint: Set up biometric access to unlock GastOS without entering your PIN.
settings.bioNotSupported: Your device does not support biometric unlock.
settings.bioReactivateHint: If you change your PIN via email recovery, you'll need to reactivate biometrics.
settings.bioErrorActivate: Could not activate. Please try again.

import_csv.title: Import CSV
import_csv.formatColumns: CSV with columns: Date, Type, Category, Amount, Note, Account, Destination account
import_csv.formatCompat: Compatible with CSV exported from GastOS and with separator , or ;
import_csv.successHint: Go to History to view them.
import_csv.errorEmpty: The file is empty or has no data.
import_csv.errorColumns: Columns 'Category' and 'Amount' were not found. Is this a CSV exported from GastOS?
import_csv.errorNoDestAccount: Transfer without a valid destination account

feedback.title: Send suggestion or bug report
feedback.placeholderIdea: What new feature would you like to see?
feedback.labelIdea: What new feature would you like to see?
feedback.successHint: We'll take note to improve GastOS.
feedback.errorSend: There was a problem sending the message. Please try again later.
feedback.errorNetwork: Connection error while sending the ticket.

encryption.para1: Your PIN generates a cryptographic key that never leaves your device. Amounts, notes, account names and budgets are encrypted with it before being sent to the server.
encryption.para2: Neither the server, administrators, nor anyone with database access can read your financial data. Only your PIN decrypts it.
encryption.warningText: If you lose your PIN, your encrypted data is unrecoverable. Keep it in a safe place.

reset_password.title: New Password
reset_password.errorLinkInvalid: The link is invalid or has expired.
reset_password.errorNoSession: No valid session detected. The link may have already been used.
reset_password.errorPasswordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and numbers.
